name: string-theory
description: David Foster Wallace's String Theory — literary toolkit exploring tennis as art, athletic genius, the psychology of elite performance, and the deep meaning found in sport's most solitary game
useCase: Understand tennis as an art form, learn the psychology of elite performance, appreciate DFW's literary craft, and find meaning in athletic discipline
knownRisks: DFW's dense footnotes and stylistic complexity may not appeal to all readers
The book is a collection of previously published essays, not a unified argument
Some readers may find DFW's intellectual approach to sport pretentious
